    Ask more of your phone.

    What if your phone could help make your life easier in more ways than you imagine?

    Google Pixel with Gemini

    Dream it bigger and do it simpler.

    With Gemini built in, you get an AI assistant that helps you unlock what’s possible and take care of what’s next.

    Nano Banana in Gemini
    Create something new in seconds by blending textures, colours or styles from any reference image with your own.
    Gemini
    Save time by asking Gemini to find info and get things done across your Google apps.
    Veo 3
    “Create a follow shot of a wise old owl high in the air, peeking through the clouds in a moonlit sky.”
    Magic Cue
    Get the info that you need, before you even have to ask.
    Google Pixel Camera

    Your moments, taken at their best.

    The award-winning camera puts a whole new lens on capturing more of the scene and your imagination.

    Camera Coach
    Snap beautiful photos with ease. Gemini models read the scene, offer suggestions and help find the best angle and lighting.
    Pro Zoom
    Zoom in up to 100x closer to see what’s going on alllll the way over there - in ultra-crisp detail.
    Pro Zoom
    Zoom in up to 100x closer to see what’s going on alllll the way over there - in ultra-crisp detail.
    Edit photos by asking
    Simply ask for the edits you want and Google Photos can bring your vision to life in seconds.
    Design

    Different, for good reason.

    Google Pixel is made to be a fuller expression of you and designed around what feels better, not what’s expected.

    Go bold, or go bolder. Show your true colours with a phone that’s a statement on its own.

    Go bold, or go bolder. Show your true colours with a phone that’s a statement on its own.

    Crafted without compromise and built to impress year after year after year.

    Your phone, your vibe. Google Pixel gives you endless ways to add your personal touch. 

    Your phone, your vibe. Google Pixel gives you endless ways to add your personal touch. 

    Your phone, your vibe. Google Pixel gives you endless ways to add your personal touch. 

    What if new never got old?

    With seven years of updates and regular Pixel Drops, that new-phone feeling doesn’t fade – it’s only the beginning.

    With Google Pixel, it all comes together brilliantly.

    Unlock your full potential with the Pixel Watch.

    Control your camera, unlock your phone (or find it) and even know who’s at your door when you pair your phone with the Pixel Watch 4.
    Learn more

    Tune in to better clarity and focus with Pixel Buds.

    With Fast Pair, Pixel Buds instantly connect to your phone for crystal clear calls, dynamic spatial audio and hands-free help with Gemini.
    Learn more

    Take charge with Pixelsnap.

    Pixelsnap gives your Pixel phone access to magnetic wireless charging and a world of accessories.
    Browse all accessories

    Charge wirelessly in a snap.

    Built with Qi2 magnetic technology, the Pixelsnap Charger instantly snaps onto your Pixel phone for a seamless charge. It reaches speeds up to 25W as it powers your phone.,
    Learn more

    Snap on. Power up. Do more.

    Use the Pixelsnap Charger with Stand to dock your phone upright so it stays useful on its way to full. Or detach the charger from the stand to take it on the go.,
    Learn more

    Case on point.

    The new Pixelsnap Cases for Pixel 10 phones are durable, beautiful and wireless charging compatible. The total package.
    Learn more

    Frequently asked questions.

    What can I transfer from my old phone to my new Pixel phone?

    Texts, contacts, photos and more will be carried over to your Pixel phone. Check the comprehensive list of what does and doesn't transfer during the switching process on the Pixel phone help page.

    Is it easy to transfer data from my old phone to my new Pixel phone?

    Switching to a Pixel phone doesn’t mean starting over. All you have to do is pair or connect your old phone with your new Pixel, and your selected data – like contacts, photos, messages and more – will copy over. Your new Pixel will guide you through the whole process, which takes about 20 minutes.,,

    Are Google apps better on a Pixel phone?

    Pixel brings the best of Google AI to you first. Your Pixel phone comes with your favourite Google apps, like Gmail, Maps and Photos, for a seamless experience.
